name: Mocking Spit: Strawberry
description: Relentless creature with a mocking smile, sharp tongue, and a deadly pursuit.

name: Esktix: Midnight
description: Fear-feeding creature lurking in shadows, inducing night terrors to sustain itself.

name: Mimic Slime: Jello
description: Flesh-dissolving slime creature, consuming prey, mimicking using bones to lure more victims.

name: Harvester: Wheat
description: Giant insect-like creature, a methodical hunter, harvesting prey with precision, extracting a specific organ.

name: Wendigo: Chocolate
